title: Bare Raise Statements should not be used in 'finally' blocks
description: Bare Raise Statements in 'finally' blocks can lead to unexpected behavior, as they will be raised regardless of exceptions raised in the main code.
message: Bare Raise Statement found in 'finally' block.
recommendation: Use a Raise statement with an Exception object instead of a bare Raise Statement in 'finally' blocks.

compliant.description: Using a Raise statement with an Exception object in 'finally' block

why_is_this_an_issue: Bare Raise Statements in 'finally' blocks can lead to unexpected behavior, as they will be raised regardless of exceptions raised in the main code.
how_to_fix: Use a Raise statement with an Exception object instead of a bare Raise Statement in 'finally' blocks.

checks.message: Bare Raise Statement found in 'finally' block.
